body_txt: When a character accidentally kidnaps someone else. This can have any number of causes behind it, ranging from honest mistakes and Contrived Coincidences to Alcohol-Induced Idiocy . Depending upon the personalities of the two characters, they might part quickly and relatively unscathed by the ordeal, but the situation can also end up as a nightmare for both of them. Super-Trope to Mistaken Kidnapper , which covers cases where someone intentionally kidnaps someone but gets the wrong person. One of the many possible answers to What Did I Do Last Night? and one way for a character to become the perpetrator of an Unintentionally Notorious Crime . Often caused by Stupid Crooks .
